LanguageData.FCP_MoleratInfestation.label: mole rat infestation
LanguageData.FCP_MoleratInfestation.letterText:
Mole rats are tunneling towards you from underground! They will break through in a few seconds and establish burrows.

The burrows will spawn more mole rats and spread throughout the area.

If you don't want the mole rats to infest the whole area, destroy the burrows. But beware - the rodents will defend their territory.
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_NCR.label: NCR tax collector caravan arrival
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_NCR.lette:
A tax collector from the NCR is approaching.

They will accept tax in caps, and NCR dollars; you can also hand in prisoners. The one who gives over the tax will receive Service Points for doing their civic duty.

You can expect a tax collector to arrive roughly twice per year as long as you are not enemies with the NCR.

<color="#808080">"In order to for a better tomorrow to be built, we must pave the way. Defense, labor and projection is not cheap however, taxes shall be needed in order to pay for this great road into the future!"</color> ~ President Kimball
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_GrizzliesPass.label: Grizzlies Pass
LanguageData.FCP_GiveQuest_StorytellerJoiner.label: a story teller
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_Mysterious_Stranger.label: Mysterious Stranger
LanguageData.FCP_Incident_Mysterious_Stranger.letterT: You have a Guardian Angel, but with a deadly hand-cannon instead of wings. Meet the Mysterious Stranger, an odd and eldritch entity said to appear and aid you in combat before you draw your dying breath. Or at least this man claims to be the Mysterious Stranger, but you'll take all the help you can get right now.
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_USA.label: US tax collector caravan arrival
LanguageData.FCP_CaravanArrivalTaxCollector_USA.lette:
A tax collector from the US is approaching.

They will accept tax in US dollars; you can also hand in prisoners. The one who gives over the tax will receive Service Points for doing their civic duty.

You can expect a tax collector to arrive roughly twice per year as long as you are not enemies with the US.

<color="#808080">
